title: Invisible Cobweb
description: Turn cobweb invisible , it is really useful for edit
body:
#  Invisible Cobwebs
Ever wanted to trap your friends, map-make like a pro, or create hilarious "fake" videos where players randomly freeze in mid-air? This pack does exactly what it says on the tin: it makes standard Minecraft cobwebs completely invisible.

The block is still physically there, but players won't see it until it's too late!

## Why use it?
The creative possibilities are endless. You can use it for:

- **Trolling & Pranks:** Place them right outside your friend's base door or at the bottom of a drop.

- **Content Creation:** Perfect for making funny TikToks, Shorts, or "cursed Minecraft" videos where you seem to float or get stuck in nothingness.

- **Custom Maps & Adventure Mode:** Create invisible barrier hazards or slow-motion trap zones without cluttering the visual design of your build.

## Performance & Details
- **Zero Lag:** This resource pack only changes a basic block model/texture. It has 0% impact on performance and will not drop your FPS.

- **Vanilla Friendly:** Works smoothly alongside your other favorite resource packs (just make sure to place this one at the top of your resource pack list!).

### Example
